Detailed Description

template<class ELFT>
struct llvm::object::Elf_Verneed_Impl< ELFT >

Elf_Verneed: This is the structure of entries in the SHT_GNU_verneed section (.gnu.version_r). This structure is identical for ELF32 and ELF64.

Definition at line 237 of file ELFTypes.h.
